meals.name: Soft-Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Feta & Berries
meals.image_prompt: Soft-boiled egg in an egg cup with golden runny yolk, slice of toasted sourdough on the side, crumbled white feta cheese, mixed berries scattered around, natural morning light on a white plate
prep_steps: Boil 14 eggs until soft-boiled (6 min), ice bath, store in fridge
Toast 7 slices sourdough, store in airtight container
day_of_steps: Place 1 soft-boiled egg in egg cup
Crumble 30g feta on a small plate
Serve with 1 slice toasted sourdough and 150g mixed berries

meals.name: Apple & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: Fresh red apple sliced in half on a white plate, scattered handful of raw almonds alongside, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Slice 1 apple
Portion 25g almonds into a small bowl
Serve together

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Veg & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: Golden grilled chicken breast fanned on a plate, beside roasted red bell pepper and zucchini, fluffy quinoa mound, drizzle of olive oil and lemon, fresh parsley, Mediterranean light
prep_steps: Marinate 700g chicken breast in lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, garlic, salt 30 min
Grill chicken 6–7 min per side, cool, portion into containers
Roast 300g bell pepper + 300g zucchini with olive oil, oregano 20 min at 200°C, cool
Cook 200g dry quinoa per packet (yields ~600g cooked), portion into containers
day_of_steps: Reheat 180g chicken in pan or microwave (2 min)
Reheat 100g roasted vegetables (2 min)
Warm 120g cooked quinoa (1 min)
Plate together, drizzle 2 tsp olive oil, squeeze lemon, garnish parsley

meals.name: Greek Yogurt & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: Creamy Greek yogurt in a glass bowl, scattered toasted walnut pieces on top, drizzle of honey, fresh mint leaf, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Portion 200g Greek yogurt into a bowl
Top with 25g walnuts
Serve

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Green Beans & New Potatoes
meals.image_prompt: Flaky white fish fillet topped with lemon and fresh parsley on a baking tray, surrounded by steamed new potatoes in their skins and tender green beans, olive oil drizzle, warm kitchen light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C
Lay 200g (Diego) or 160g (Diana) white fish on parchment, season salt & pepper, add 1 lemon slice, drizzle 1 tsp olive oil
Bake 12–14 min
Meanwhile, boil 150g new potatoes (Diego) or 120g (Diana) in salted water 10 min
Steam 100g green beans (Diego) or 80g (Diana) 6 min
Plate fish, potatoes, green beans together, finish with parsley

ingredients.item: White fish fillet (sea bass or cod)
White fish fillet (sea bass or cod)

meals.name: Asian Chicken Stir-Fry with Bok Choy & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: Tender chicken pieces and crisp bok choy in a savory brown sauce, fluffy brown rice mound, sesame seeds sprinkled on top, fresh ginger slices visible, wok-tossed finish, warm overhead lighting
prep_steps: Slice 700g chicken breast into bite-sized pieces
Stir-fry in 2 tsp sesame oil with garlic & ginger until cooked through 8 min, add soy sauce 1 tsp, cool
Chop 350g bok choy, sauté 2 min in 1 tsp sesame oil, cool
Cook 180g dry brown rice per packet (yields ~540g cooked), cool and portion
day_of_steps: Reheat 180g chicken + bok choy mixture in pan (2 min)
Warm 110g cooked brown rice (1 min)
Plate rice, top with chicken & bok choy, sprinkle sesame seeds and fresh ginger

day_of_steps: Peel 1 orange, separate into segments
Portion 25g almonds into a small bowl
Arrange on a plate, serve

meals.name: Pan-Seared Salmon with Roasted Asparagus & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: Pink-fleshed salmon fillet with crispy skin, golden roasted asparagus spears arranged alongside, cubed roasted sweet potato with herbs, lemon wedge, restaurant plating with fresh herbs, warm lighting
day_of_steps: Cube 150g (Diego) or 120g (Diana) sweet potato, toss with 0.5 tsp olive oil & paprika, roast 200°C 15 min
Pat dry 200g (Diego) or 160g (Diana) salmon fillet, season salt & pepper
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan, sear salmon skin-side down 4 min, flip 3 min
Toss 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) fresh asparagus with 0.5 tsp olive oil, salt; roast 10 min at 200°C
Plate salmon, asparagus, sweet potato; finish with lemon

meals.name: Spiced Chicken Bowl with Roasted Vegetables & Canned Lentils
meals.image_prompt: Diced seasoned chicken over fluffy cooked lentils, roasted carrots and eggplant alongside, drizzle of olive oil, cumin-paprika aroma, warm bowl, fresh parsley garnish
prep_steps: Cube 700g chicken breast, season with cumin, paprika, salt & garlic
Pan-fry in 2 tsp olive oil 10 min until golden, cool and portion
Cube 300g eggplant + 250g carrots, roast with 1 tsp olive oil & cumin 20 min at 200°C, cool
Rinse and warm 400g canned lentils (yields ~300g), portion
day_of_steps: Reheat 180g cumin-paprika chicken in pan (2 min)
Reheat 100g roasted eggplant & carrots (1 min)
Warm 100g lentils (1 min)
Plate together, drizzle 0.5 tsp olive oil, garnish parsley

meals.name: Herb-Baked White Fish with Spinach & Potatoes
meals.image_prompt: Tender white fish fillet with herb crust on parchment, sautéed spinach wilted on the side, golden boiled potatoes, lemon zest, fresh dill garnish, bakery-fresh aroma, warm plate
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C
Boil 150g (Diego) or 120g (Diana) potatoes in salted water 10 min
Season 200g (Diego) or 160g (Diana) white fish with salt, pepper, fresh dill; wrap in parchment
Bake fish 12 min
Sauté 80g (Diego) or 65g (Diana) fresh spinach in 0.75 tsp olive oil with garlic 3 min
Plate fish, spinach, potatoes; finish with lemon zest and dill

Rinse 380g canned white beans, warm gently (yields ~280g), portion

meals.image_prompt: Pink-fleshed salmon fillet with crispy skin, blistered cherry tomatoes sautéed with basil, fluffy couscous pilaf, olive oil drizzle, fresh basil leaf garnish, warm dining light
day_of_steps: Bring 180ml salted water to boil, add 80g (Diego) or 65g (Diana) dry couscous, remove from heat, cover 5 min
Pat dry 200g (Diego) or 160g (Diana) salmon, season salt & pepper
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan, sear salmon skin-side down 4 min, flip 3 min
In another pan, sauté 120g (Diego) or 100g (Diana) cherry tomatoes in 0.5 tsp olive oil with basil 3 min
Fluff couscous with fork, plate with salmon and tomatoes, finish with basil and lemon

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Green Beans & Potatoes in Tomato Sauce
meals.image_prompt: Flaky white fish fillet in a light tomato sauce with fresh basil, tender green beans, boiled new potatoes in their skins, pan-finished with olive oil, aromatic herbs, warm evening light on plated meal
day_of_steps: Boil 150g (Diego) or 120g (Diana) new potatoes in salted water 10 min
Preheat oven to 200°C
Simmer 150ml low-sodium vegetable stock with 2 tbsp tomato paste, 1 tsp olive oil, garlic, basil for 5 min
Place 200g (Diego) or 160g (Diana) white fish in baking dish, pour sauce over, bake 12 min
Steam 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) green beans 6 min
Plate fish with sauce, green beans, potatoes; finish with fresh basil
